clues: The laptop will not resume from hibernation and shows a blank screen.
Pressing the power button starts a fresh boot cycle instead of resuming the previous session.
The user has to force a shutdown and loses all unsaved work.
The issue occurs most frequently when the laptop's battery drains completely during hibernation.
The Windows event logs show 'Hibernation file (C:\hiberfil.sys) is too small to resume the session'.
